title: agrostis microphylla
intro: Agrostis microphylla, also known as small-leaved bentgrass or small bent grass, is a species of grass native to various parts of the world, including North America and Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be attributed to the presence of certain bioactive compounds. The medicinal properties of Agrostis microphylla have been associated with various health benefits, including reduced inflammation, improved wound healing, and antioxidant activity. Agrostis microphylla is often used in herbal preparations, such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
